hooks.command:
TASK=$(cat .current-task 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$TASK" ]; then PROGRESS=$(tail -20 memory-bank/tasks/$TASK/progress.md 2>/dev/null | tr '
' ' ' | sed 's/"/\"/g'); PLAN=$(head -40 memory-bank/tasks/$TASK/task_plan.md 2>/dev/null | tr '
' ' ' | sed 's/"/\"/g'); REVIEW=$(tail -10 memory-bank/reviews/main-agent.md 2>/dev/null | tr '
' ' ' | sed 's/"/\"/g'); echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"Active task: '"$TASK"'  | Plan: '"$PLAN"'  | Recent progress: '"$PROGRESS"'  | Review: '"$REVIEW"'"}}'; else TASKS=$(grep -i 'in.progress' memory-bank/tasks/INDEX.md 2>/dev/null | head -3 | tr '
' ' ' | sed 's/"/\"/g'); if [ -n "$TASKS" ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"No .current-task file but found in-progress tasks in INDEX.md: '"$TASKS"' -- Ask user which to resume."}}'; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"No active task. Use /ingest-task to create one."}}'; fi; fi

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"[Learning Check] If this interaction revealed a correction, knowledge gap, unexpected behavior, or reusable pattern — log it to .learnings/ before moving on."}}'

TASK=$(cat .current-task 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$TASK" ] && [ -f "memory-bank/tasks/$TASK/task_plan.md" ]; then PLAN=$(head -30 memory-bank/tasks/$TASK/task_plan.md 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/"/\\"/g'); echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"Current plan: $PLAN\"}}"; fi; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); EXIT_CODE=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); r=d.get('tool_response',{}); print(r.get('exitCode','0') if isinstance(r,dict) else '0')" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$EXIT_CODE" != "0" ] && [ "$EXIT_CODE" != "None" ]; then CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('command','unknown'))" 2>/dev/null); mkdir -p .learnings; TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y-%m-%d\ %H:%M); SHORTCMD=$(echo "$CMD" | head -c 80); EXISTING=$(grep -c "$SHORTCMD" .learnings/ERRORS.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$EXISTING" -gt 0 ]; then COUNT=$((EXISTING + 1)); echo "- $TIMESTAMP — Command failed (${COUNT}x): \`$SHORTCMD\` (exit $EXIT_CODE) — SEE ALSO: previous entries above" >> .learnings/ERRORS.md; if [ "$COUNT" -ge 3 ]; then echo "- $TIMESTAMP — **PROMOTE**: \`$SHORTCMD\` has failed ${COUNT}x. Add to CLAUDE.md Known Issues." >> .learnings/ERRORS.md; fi; else echo "- $TIMESTAMP — Command failed: \`$SHORTCMD\` (exit $EXIT_CODE)" >> .learnings/ERRORS.md; fi; fi; exit 0

hooks.prompt:
!!!IMPORTANT!!! Respond with ONLY a JSON object. No other text.
Format:  {"decision": "approve" or "block", "reason": "[list anything missing, or OK]"}

Two checks:
1. Was progress.md updated this session with task progress?
2. If agents were delegated, was their performance logged to reviews/?
